creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Given Android is affected maybe assert() aren't tested often with
> non-glibc before a release.

Android also often uses older kernels than desktop distros (upstream bug doesn't seem to document kernel version). FreeBSD >= 13.0 is still stuck with Linux 5.4 (newer are non-default on -CURRENT) but Alpine, Arch, Fedora are already on Linux 5.15.

See also
https://www.kernel.org/category/releases.html (5.4 is 2 LTS behind)
https://repology.org/project/linux/versions
